name: rare-vet-lims
description: Rare Veterinary Care LIMS — cloud deployment

scripts.build:cloud: cd frontend && npm ci --include=dev && VITE_API_URL=/api npm run build && cd ../frontend-portal && npm ci --include=dev && VITE_API_URL=/api npm run build && cd ../backend && npm ci --omit=dev
scripts.build:portal: cd frontend-portal && npm ci --include=dev && VITE_API_URL=/api npm run build
